title: Veda (Youngling)
content:

Master Windu!''"
"''Veda! Get back here immediately!''"
"''But I want to ask him something!"|Veda and her instructor|}} '''Veda''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying within the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. At a young age, Veda was identified and inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and began her [[Jedi training/Legends|studies]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Veda and her [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] were passing down a corridor at the temple, when she recognized [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] passing by and went to him to ask the senior [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] a "very important question," much to the distress of [[Unidentified Jedi instructor|her instructor]]. ==Behind the scenes== Veda appeared in the [[2004]] young readers novel ''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'', written by [[Elizabeth Hand]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]]
